terms.name: Risk Prediction
terms.definition: Forecasted risk with likelihood, impact, and mitigation

terms.name: Scenario
terms.definition: What-if analysis without live data modification

terms.name: Recommendation
terms.definition: Advisory action with why, evidence, and expected benefit

terms.name: AI Confidence Framework
terms.definition: Transparent AI output with known unknowns

terms.name: Learning Feedback
terms.definition: Prediction vs outcome comparison for model improvement

terms.name: Federation Intelligence
terms.definition: Cross-institution comparison without exposing restricted data

terms.name: Continuous Learning Loop
terms.definition: Observe, analyze, predict, compare, learn, improve

terms.name: Advisory Only
terms.definition: Predictions inform but never replace Human judgment

terms.name: Evidence Backed
terms.definition: Every prediction links to authoritative data
